refined_fr.refined_fr: Provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle identification, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into specific sub-functions clarifies scope and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map with terrain, obstacles, and work-zone features, validated against ground truth data and stakeholder acceptance.
sub_frs: FR1: Map terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work-zones within the worksite.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping.
DP2: Employ GIS-based digital mapping for work-zone representation.
DP3: Integrate sensor data with real-time processing algorithms for dynamic updates.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping.

potential_sources: Sensor data fusion tightly coupled with terrain and obstacle mapping functions.
Work-zone representation logically separated via GIS mapping.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 addresses terrain and obstacle mapping with minimal coupling to work-zone representation, enabling modular design.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors.
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting map quality.
High safety criticality requires robust error handling.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider separating work-zone representation DP to reduce coupling and improve modularity.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and integration of sensor data for worksite mapping and modeling.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with Safety Services and remote monitoring.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of mapping functions; low diffusion as core processing is centralized.
Limited containment; mostly sensor data source and actuator target.
Primarily consumer of mapping data; low containment.
Minimal containment; mainly receives safety alerts.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports safety criticality.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex.
Interface latency between Vehicle sensors and NGHE Solution may affect real-time updates.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution; consider modular subcomponents if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Centralization in NGHE Solution may increase module complexity and maintenance effort.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the best module for DP realization.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module's output against known site data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to DP and IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider splitting work-zone representation into a separate DP and IM to reduce coupling.
Evaluate sensor data latency impact on real-time mapping.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are valid, separating work-zone representation will improve modularity and reduce coupling, addressing safety criticality concerns.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Map terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work-zones within the worksite.

revise.why: To separate work-zone representation DP from terrain and obstacle mapping to improve modularity and reduce coupling.

assumptions: LIDAR and camera sensors provide reliable data.
NGHE Solution module can handle centralized processing.
open_risks: Sensor data inaccuracies impacting map quality.
Potential complexity and latency in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Performance data of sensor fusion algorithms.
Latency measurements between Vehicle sensors and NGHE Solution.
